items.description: Your personal intelligence agent. Watches the world from multiple data sources and pings you when something changes.

items.name: Recordly
items.description: A free, open-source Screen Studio alternative that adds auto-zoom, cursor animations and more to your screen recordings. Substantially modifies the OpenScreen foundation.

items.name: pi-autoresearch
items.description: Autonomous experiment loop extension for pi

items.name: chrome-cdp-skill
items.description: Give your AI agent access to your live Chrome session — works out of the box, connects to tabs you already have open

items.name: openclaw-control-center
items.description: Turn OpenClaw from a black box into a local control center you can see, trust, and control.

items.name: gsd-2
items.description: A powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system that enables agents to work for long periods of time autonomously without losing track of the big picture

items.name: inkos
items.description: Autonomous novel writing CLI agent — AI agents write, audit, and revise novels with human review gates

items.name: opencli
items.description: Make any website your CLI. A powerful, AI-native runtime for seamless browser automation and dynamic web data extraction.

items.name: tavily-key-generator
items.description: Multi-service toolkit for Tavily and Firecrawl signup automation, key validation, and isolated proxy pools.

items.name: autoresearch
items.description: Claude Autoresearch Skill — Autonomous goal-directed iteration for Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch. Modify → Verify → Keep/Discard → Repeat forever.

items.name: OpenSquirrel
items.description: For people who get distracted by agents. A native Rust/GPUI control plane for running Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode side by side — because if you're going to be squirrely, you might as well optimize for it.

items.name: atlas-gic
items.description: ATLAS by General Intelligence Capital — Self-improving AI trading agents using Karpathy-style autoresearch

items.name: pi-generative-ui
items.description: Claude.ai's generative UI — reverse-engineered, rebuilt for pi. Interactive HTML/SVG widgets in native macOS windows.
